hero.subtitle: Fresh each morning, flame-kissed liver over oak embers — plus tantuni and kebab straight off the grill. The same craft in İzmir, Ankara and İstanbul.

about.title: One ember, one master, one tradition
about.p1: Ciğerci Apo grew up beside an oak-fed fire, carrying Mersin's ember-liver tradition. Every skewer is threaded by hand, every portion cooked at the grill's exact heat.
about.p2: Today the same spice, the same hands and the same ember flavor reach the table across three branches — from the home grill in İzmir to Ankara and İstanbul.

specialties.title: Flavors born over the coals
specialties.subtitle: The stars of the menu — the boldest of ember and spice.

ciger.name: Ember Liver Skewer
ciger.desc: Our signature, flame-kissed with house spice over oak coals.

tantuni.name: Mersin Tantuni
tantuni.desc: Griddle-seared and wrapped with lemon and spice.

adana.name: Adana Kebab
adana.desc: Hand-minced and smoky, a spiced feast off the embers.

kunefe.name: Künefe
kunefe.desc: Shredded kadayıf, melting cheese, served ember-hot.
